class.name: GKVoiceChat
class.brief_description: Represents a Game Center voice chat channel.
class.description: Use [method GKMatch.voice_chat] to open a voice channel for a realtime match, then call [method start] / [method stop] and monitor [signal player_state_changed].

method.name: is_voip_allowed
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] when voice chat is allowed on the current platform/account.

method.name: set_player_muted
method.description: Mutes or unmutes [param player] in this channel.

members.member: Whether this voice chat is currently active.
Players currently participating in the channel.

signal.name: player_state_changed
signal.description: Emitted when a player's voice chat state changes. [param state] uses Apple's raw [code skip-lint]GKVoiceChat.PlayerState[/code] value.
